basic_details.job_title: ITAT Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 42 Senior Private Secretary & Private Secretary Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Income Tax Appellate Tribunal (ITAT), Ministry of Law & Justice
basic_details.post_name: Senior Private Secretary & Private Secretary (Group B Gazetted)
basic_details.short_information: ITAT is recruiting 42 posts of Senior Private Secretary and Private Secretary on regular basis.

age_limit.details: Maximum age 35 years as on the crucial date (30th day from publication in Employment News). Age relaxation applicable for SC/ST/OBC/Government servants as per rules.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | shorthand speed: 120 w.p.m. in English | computer knowledge: Working knowledge of MS Office, Excel, etc. | age limit: Not exceeding 35 years (relaxation as per GoI rules)

selection_process: Written Examination (200 Marks) Skill Test (Shorthand & Typing) Personal Interview
Final merit will be based on Skill Test + Interview.

exam_pattern.details: Skill Test: English Shorthand @120 wpm & Typing @45 wpm.

how_to_apply: Submit online application within the deadline.
Candidates applying for both posts need to submit only one application.
important_instructions: Applications only through online mode. Selected candidates will be on 2 years probation. Posting can be anywhere in India. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

content_sections.heading: Income Tax Appellate Tribunal Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: The Income Tax Appellate Tribunal has released a detailed Vacancy Circular for filling up existing and anticipated vacancies in the cadres of Senior Private Secretary and Private Secretary (Group 'B' Gazetted) at various Benches. The notification includes complete details on vacancies, pay, eligibility, scheme of examination, skill test, and application instructions. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full notification before applying. Download Income Tax Appellate Tribunal Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Income Tax Appellate Tribunal Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: ITAT is recruiting 42 posts of Senior Private Secretary and Private Secretary on regular basis.

rows.income_tax_appellate_tribunal_itat_minis: Senior Private Secretary & Private Secretary (Group B Gazetted)
Written Exam + Skill Test + Personal Interview

rows.details: Working knowledge of MS Office, Excel, etc.
Not exceeding 35 years (relaxation as per GoI rules)

content_sections.heading: ITAT Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum age 35 years as on the crucial date (30th day from publication in Employment News). Age relaxation applicable for SC/ST/OBC/Government servants as per rules.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written Examination (200 Marks) Skill Test (Shorthand & Typing) Personal Interview Final merit will be based on Skill Test + Interview.

content_sections.heading: ITAT Exam Pattern (Written Examination)
content_sections.text: Skill Test: English Shorthand @120 wpm & Typing @45 wpm.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ITAT Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit itat.gov.in/recruitments . Submit online application within the deadline. Upload self-attested documents. Candidates applying for both posts need to submit only one application.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Applications only through online mode. Selected candidates will be on 2 years probation . Posting can be anywhere in India. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in ITAT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Total 42 posts (22 Senior Private Secretary + 20 Private Secretary).

faq.question: Q2. What is the pay scale for Senior Private Secretary in ITAT?
Q3. What is the shorthand speed required for ITAT Private Secretary?
faq.answer: 120 words per minute in English Shorthand.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for ITAT Group B posts?
Q5. What is the selection process for ITAT Sr. PS / PS 2026?
faq.answer: Written Exam + Skill Test + Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any negative marking in ITAT Written Examination?
faq.answer: Check the detailed notification for marking scheme.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the ITAT Written Exam and Skill Test be conducted?
faq.answer: At 9 centers: Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata, Chennai, Bangalore, Guwahati, Lucknow, Ahmedabad, Hyderabad.
